message: fix(api): simplify bulk moderation control flow (bd-kbl0)

@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ {"id":"bd-5yij","title":"Bug: Share link password cannot be cleared","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-01T18:48:19.568318059Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T18:55:10.120961778Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T18:55:10.120944184Z","close_reason":"Allow clearing share link password by honoring null input","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-cry3","title":"CRITICAL: Mobile button text truncation in prompt detail modal","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-21T20:22:11.539628983Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T20:26:49.820782671Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T20:26:49.820733619Z","close_reason":"Fixed mobile button truncation - restructured to use full-width primary action + 2x2 grid for secondary actions","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-d43s","title":"Feature: Prompt Dependency Graph + Impact Analysis","description":"## Background Prompts are reused across packs, workflows, schedules, and share links. Pro users need to understand what will break if a prompt changes. ## Scope - Maintain graph edges: prompt -> packs, workflows, schedules, share links, and collections. - Impact analysis when editing: show downstream items and required confirmations. - Graph view with filters and export. - CLI: `jfp impact ` and `jfp graph export`. - Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content). ## Deliverables - Graph storage model + API endpoints. - UI graph explorer + impact warnings. - CLI commands with JSON export. ## Test Requirements ### Unit Tests - Graph integrity rules and edge updates on edits/deletes. - Impact analysis accuracy. ### Integration Tests - Changes in prompts propagate to dependent items. - Graph export format is stable. ### E2E Tests - Edit prompt -> impact modal -> confirm -> updates applied. - CLI impact -> matches UI counts. ## Success Criteria - Users can see downstream dependencies before editing. - Accidental breaking changes are prevented.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:14:14.088091888Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T18:28:25.911806225Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T18:28:25.911787500Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} +{"id":"bd-kbl0","title":"Audit remaining web API endpoints","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-01T19:18:16.103471461Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T19:19:01.860434052Z","closed_at":"2026-02-01T19:19:01.860408715Z","close_reason":"Audited all web API endpoints; no new issues found","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-kfuj","title":"Feature: CLI Premium Pack Subscriptions + Update Notifications","description":"## Background Pro users subscribe to premium prompt packs and expect updates to flow into their CLI without manual downloads. ## Scope - CLI pack commands: `jfp packs subscribe/list/update/changelog`. - Local cache with signed manifest and version history. - Update notifications on new pack releases; optional auto‑update. - License metadata + entitlement checks (Pro-only). - Prompts/prompt packs only (no SKILL.md or skills content). ## Deliverables - Pack subscription API endpoints + entitlement checks. - CLI flows for subscribe/update and changelog viewing. - Local cache format + integrity verification. - Upgrade messaging for free users. ## Test Requirements ### Unit Tests - Manifest verification and cache integrity. - Entitlement checks and error formatting. ### Integration Tests - Subscribe -> update -> changelog with real API calls. - Cache refresh on new pack release. ### E2E Tests - Pro user subscribes -> pack content available in CLI. - Free user attempt -> upgrade guidance. ## Success Criteria - Pro users can keep packs up to date with minimal effort. - Updates are secure and auditable.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T14:14:29.605565630Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-01T17:59:13.538749684Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"bd-wsye","title":"Docs: Clarify CLI Free vs Pro + Build Guidance","description":"## Background Users reported that the jfp CLI does not compile and are confused about Free vs Pro gating. ## Scope - Clarify Free vs Pro command gating in the main README. - Add build guidance confirming no Pro account is required to compile. - Update CLI premium integration doc with a gating summary. - Improve bug report template for build failures. ## Completed Changes - Updated README Free vs Pro section + build steps. - Added gating summary to docs/cli-premium-integration.md. - Added CLI build diagnostics section to .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md. ## Success Criteria - OSS users can build the CLI without Pro. - Pro-only commands are clearly communicated. - Issue reports include build details. ","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T13:57:57.737302847Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T13:57:57.737302847Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T13:57:57.737302847Z","external_ref":"bd-pg3a","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-02u","title":"Build ChangelogAccordion for prompt detail pages","description":"**Details:** - Shows version history when prompt.changelog exists - Accordion expansion (collapsed by default) - Lists changes chronologically (newest first) - Version, date, and change description per entry **Changelog Type (in types.ts):** ```typescript interface PromptChange { version: string; date: string; changes: string[]; } // On Prompt interface: changelog?: PromptChange[]; ``` **Implementation:** ```typescript // apps/web/src/components/changelog-accordion.tsx interface ChangelogAccordionProps { changelog: PromptChange[]; } export function ChangelogAccordion({ changelog }: ChangelogAccordionProps) { const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false); if (!changelog?.length) return null; return (
{expanded && (
    {changelog.map((entry) => (
  • {entry.version} {entry.date}
      {entry.changes.map((change, i) => (
    • {change}
      • ))}
    • ))}
)}
); } ``` **Location:** apps/web/src/components/changelog-accordion.tsx **Reasoning:** Changelogs build trust and help users understand prompt evolution. Accordion keeps the UI clean while making history accessible.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:35:24.004177827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T21:50:21.229495631Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T21:50:21.229495631Z","close_reason":"Created ChangelogAccordion with collapsible UI, type-specific icons/colors, and timeline styling.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0}
